message:
feat(gateway): add secret loader service for tool credentials (bd-2n73.12)

Secure loading hooks for private repo tool secrets:
- Multi-source resolution: env mapping → conventional env → file-based
- File-based secrets via secrets.yaml (inline values or file: references)
- Bulk loading with missing-required tracking
- Safe diagnostics that never expose secret values
- Graceful no-op when private dir is absent

16 tests covering all loading paths, priority, and error handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
